questions.q: What did you learn in Computer Introduction?
questions.hint: Read the notes first, then answer.

notes.text: I have a lot of fun with my friends like Penny, Jodu, Sharpy and many others. How can a computer be our friend?
Places where computers can be seen
Computer! Computer! Our friendship will have no end,
Computer! Computer! Let me write my name,
Computer! Computer! Let me play a game,
Computer! Computer! Let me draw the Sun,
Computer! Computer! Let me have some fun.
We all have friends. We like to play with them. Let us meet a new friend .....
This is a computer! We can play with it like we play with our other friends.
Fill your new friend Computer with colours of your choice.
PLACES WHERE COMPUTERS CAN BE SEEN

questions.q: I have a lot of fun with my friends like Penny, Jodu, Sharpy and many others. How can a computer be our friend?
questions.hint: Think about what you learned in this chapter.

questions.q: Yes, this is a computer! Which all places do we see computers in use?
questions.hint: Think about what you learned in this chapter.

questions.q: 1. We can see desktops in use in/at ___ and in office.
options: 2. We can see tablets in use in/at ___
3. We can see laptops in use in/at - Aamk8
4. We can see ___ in use at shops and malls.
questions.answer: 2. We can see tablets in use in/at ___

questions.q: Look around with your friends for pictures of computers. Paste or draw the picture of your new friend - Computer on a chart paper. Also, name which type of computer is it. Is it a desktop? Is it a laptop? Is it a tablet? Is it a smartphone?
questions.hint: Think about what you learned in this chapter.

questions.q: Do you know, my friend Kainchi is also a machine. It helps us to cut and make new things. How is my friend-computer, a smart machine?
questions.hint: Think about what you learned in this chapter.

notes.text: I can do a lot of work like paint, write and play music.
I can store a lot of things, like pictures, books, songs and movies.
I do what you ask me to do.
machine- a man-made thing that helps us do our work easily fuel- things like petrol, wood that give power to machines to work
B. Write whether true or false.
1. A washing machine runs on fuel.
2. Smartphone is a machine as it makes our work easy.
3. Sun is not a machine as it is not made by people.

questions.q: What did you learn in Computer A Smart Machine?
questions.hint: Read the notes first, then answer.

notes.text: My friend Gadbad is very helpful. If I make any mistake it erases that. How useful and helpful is a computer? Why do we use a computer?
Computer is a very useful machine. It helps us to do a lot of things.
She solves sums faster on it.

notes.text: 4. In school, we should take _____ to use the computer.
2. The keys of the keyboard should be pressed ---
1. Computer must be kept clean and ___
B. Fill in the blanks using words from the Help-Box.
Discuss with your friends and plan rules for using your computer. The rules should have both do's and don'ts.
4. Whom should we ask for help while using the computer?
3. How should we sit in front of a computer?
2. Write any one thing that we should not do while using the computer.
1. Write any one thing that we should do while using the computer.
3. Neha wants to clean her computer. She should use a _
2. Akansha is typing on the keyboard. She should press the keys ___
1. Rishi is playing games on the computer. He should keep the sound.
E. Select the correct options from the choices given.
